parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "agent": "customer-research",
  "task": "Generar ICP document v0 basado en intake responses + scrapeo web · 1-3 audience segments · JTBD + objeciones",

  "workflow_id": "{{  $workflow.id  }}",
  "workflow_execution_id": "{{  $execution.id  }}"
}

={

  "client_id": "{{  $('Journey B entry (from Master Orchestrator)').first().json.body.client_id  }}",
  "workflow_id": "{{  $workflow.id  }}",
  "workflow_execution_id": "{{  $execution.id  }}"
}

nodes.name: Step 8 · Notion API · crear workspace real

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "client_id": "{{  $('Journey B entry (from Master Orchestrator)').first().json.body.client_id  }}",
  "client_name": "{{  ($('Journey B entry (from Master Orchestrator)').first().json.body.campaign_brief && ($('Journey B entry (from Master Orchestrator)').first().json.body.campaign_brief.client_name || $('Journey B entry (from Master Orchestrator)').first().json.body.campaign_brief.company)) || ('Cliente · ' + $('Journey B entry (from Master Orchestrator)').first().json.body.client_id)  }}",
  "industry": "{{  ($('Journey B entry (from Master Orchestrator)').first().json.body.campaign_brief && $('Journey B entry (from Master Orchestrator)').first().json.body.campaign_brief.industry) || ''  }}",
  "primary_contact": "{{  ($('Journey B entry (from Master Orchestrator)').first().json.body.campaign_brief && $('Journey B entry (from Master Orchestrator)').first().json.body.campaign_brief.primary_contact) || ''  }}",
  "onboarding_notes": "Workspace creado automáticamente por Journey B Step 8 (Sprint 8D dual-mode refactor 2026-05-25 CC#2) · journey_id {{  $('Journey B entry (from Master Orchestrator)').first().json.body._journey_id  }} · trigger {{  $('Journey B entry (from Master Orchestrator)').first().json.body.trigger_source  }}",
  "workflow_id": "{{  $workflow.id  }}",
  "workflow_execution_id": "{{  $execution.id  }}"
}

={
  "agent": "sales-enablement",
  "task": "Generar kickoff deck para {{  $('Journey B entry (from Master Orchestrator)').first().json.body.client_id  }} · slides: vision · KPIs propuestos · timeline · sprint 1 plan · communication cadence",
  "client_id": "{{  $('Journey B entry (from Master Orchestrator)').first().json.body.client_id  }}",
  "workflow_id": "{{  $workflow.id  }}",
  "workflow_execution_id": "{{  $execution.id  }}"
}

nodes.name: Step 10 · HITL · Brand Book + KPIs validation (Emilio + Cliente)

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "from": "journey-b-onboard",
  "to": "approval_required",
  "type": "approval",
  "subject": "Brand Book v0 + Kickoff deck para {{  $('Journey B entry (from Master Orchestrator)').first().json.body.client_id  }} · validar antes de presentar al cliente",
  "body": "Auto-generated · review needed before client kickoff call",
  "requires_response": true,
  "items": [
    { "type": "brand_book", "link": "..." },
    { "type": "icp", "link": "..." },
    { "type": "competitive", "link": "..." },
    { "type": "kickoff_deck", "link": "..." }
  ]
}

nodes.name: Step 10b · E-009 IF edit_iteration_count >= 2 THEN escalate

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "from": "journey-b-onboard",
  "to": "jefe-client-success",
  "type": "escalation",
  "subject": "Brand Book edit loop max · cliente {{  $('Journey B entry (from Master Orchestrator)').first().json.body.client_id  }} requiere intervención",
  "body": "Cliente solicitó {{  $json.edit_iteration_count  }} edits. Max 2 permitido. Escalating para resolver."
}

={
  "agent": "jefe-marketing",
  "task": "Producir plan del primer sprint · 2-3 deliverables iniciales · deadlines · agentes asignados",
  "client_id": "{{  $('Journey B entry (from Master Orchestrator)').first().json.body.client_id  }}",
  "workflow_id": "{{  $workflow.id  }}",
  "workflow_execution_id": "{{  $execution.id  }}"
}
